# Pratik Pawar

> Senior Flutter developer in Nashik, India with 5+ years building fast, tested, store-ready mobile apps across HealthTech, agri-tech, restaurant tech and e-commerce — payments, GraphQL, CI/CD, and AI-augmented TDD. Open to remote work.

## Pages

- [Portfolio](https://pratikpwr.me/): Full profile — about, selected work, experience, method, and contact

## Key facts

- Role: Software Crafter II at Incubyte (remote); previously Senior Flutter Developer at eatOS, Mobile Application Developer at FarmSetu, Flutter Developer at DreamCare Developers
- Focus: Flutter / Dart cross-platform apps; clean architecture; TDD; payments (Stripe, Adyen, NFC); GraphQL; Firebase; CI/CD
- AI tooling: Cursor, Claude Code, agentic PR-review workflows; built Nirmo (AI-powered Flutter app builder)
- Track record: 5+ years shipping; 11 apps built (6 on Play Store); −12% transaction costs at eatOS; +30% weekly active users at FarmSetu
- Notable projects: Nirmo, eatOS POS / Kitchen Display / Point of Purchase, SetuFarm, SetuTrade, Nearme, Police Patil System, graphql_network_devtools (pub.dev)
- Location: Nashik, India — remote-ready, IST
- Community: Speaker, Flutter Nashik; host of tech meetups
- Education: B.E. Computer Science, SITRC Nashik
